permissions.label: Wedding planner: view weddings, checklists, budgets and rundowns
Wedding planner: create and edit weddings, checklists, budgets and rundowns

credits.label: Create a wedding
credits.description: Charged when a new wedding page is created, including its seeded checklist and budget. Free until priced.

credits.label: Add a checklist task
credits.description: Charged per checklist task created, including seeded template tasks. Free until priced.

credits.label: Add a budget item
credits.description: Charged per budget item created, including seeded template items. Free until priced.

credits.label: Add a rundown item
credits.description: Charged per wedding-day rundown item created, including generated template items. Free until priced.

credits.label: Delete a wedding
credits.description: Charged per wedding cascade-delete operation. Free until priced.

limits.label: Checklist tasks per wedding
limits.description: Checklist tasks attached to a single wedding.

limits.label: Budget items per wedding
limits.description: Budget items attached to a single wedding.

limits.label: Rundown items per wedding
limits.description: Rundown items attached to a single wedding.
